name: chip8-emulator
description: A CHIP-8 emulator that runs in the browser, written in TypeScript with Vite and HTML canvas.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.scripts.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run build
